blocks.content: Seeing the look of a craftsman in Shirone's eyes as he sewed, Dante spoke with a bewildered expression.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Hey, do you really have to sew here?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is the only coat I brought. And if I do it outside, my hands will freeze.
Shirone blew on his still-cold hands and focused on sewing again.
After ordering tea at the counter, Dante returned with Armand, which Shirone had leaned against the wall.
Shirone glanced at Armand. The usually temperamental cursed sword was quiet, as if acknowledging that Dante was worthy of examining it.
With people watching, Dante didn't draw the sword but inspected its exterior while holding it vertically.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: So, this is an S-class object.
He had heard a rough explanation on the way.
A cursed sword equipped with the concepts of precise control and diamond armor.
It was a perfect weapon that not only amplified magical power but also maximized physical offensive and defensive capabilities.
Dante threw Armand against the wall.
Shirone used precise control to return it accurately to its original position.
Seeing this firsthand, Dante smiled.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: It's a good weapon. Considering its rarity, I understand why it's worth over 4 billion gold.
Amy, who had been warming herself by the fireplace, turned her head and spoke.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: You talk about 4 billion gold so casually? Well, the Airhain family is ranked 20th in the kingdom's business world. But why does a young master from such a family need to get coffee from others?

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Haha! Coffee made by others always tastes better. And coffee bought by others tastes even better. Besides, if a single sword is worth 4 billion gold, my parents would be shocked too.
Shirone, who had finished sewing the first button, connected the needle to the second button and said,

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Too bad. I was thinking of selling it for around 3 billion if you were interested.
Armand's gem vibrated with a hum.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: I'm not really into collecting things. I don't even buy souvenirs when I travel.
Dante calling an S-class object a mere collectible showed he wasn't a typical person.
But Shirone liked that about him.
After all, mages only cared about what they liked and ignored everything else.
While Shirone finished sewing and put his coat back on, the server brought their drinks.
Shirone and Amy drank their juice and cocoa in silence for a while.
Just a moment ago, they had been laughing and having a great time, but with Dante around, they suddenly became reserved.
Dante sat with his legs crossed, sipping his coffee and watching them.
Then he pointed at Amy with his coffee cup.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: By the way, how are you doing?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Huh? What do you mean?

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Neither of you seem like the type to go on a casual date. Is this a consolation trip or something?
Shirone put down his cup and looked at Amy.
It was the first time she had talked about the graduation exam.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Hmm.
Amy rested her chin on her hand and looked out the window.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Honestly, I don't know. It's not that I've lost motivation, but everything feels so vague.
Having had enough time to organize her thoughts, Amy spoke calmly.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Anyway, I did my best for six years and took the exam. But I failed. I don't know what to do next. I feel like just improving my skills won't be enough. So, I guess...
Amy sighed and shrugged.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: I'm just trying to pull myself together. It's probably a psychological issue with the second attempt. I need to find or create a special trigger.
Dante nodded.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Of course, he hadn't even considered the possibility of failing the graduation exam. But if he had, he would have had the same concerns as Amy.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: The atmosphere shifted...
If they could change the battlefield's atmosphere at will in one-on-one combat, it meant their skills were far superior to expected.
But there was no reason someone with Amy's keen eye wouldn't notice if they were hiding their skills. That's why Amy was confused.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: It's not just a simple disguise tactic. There's something undiscovered. Probably the key player is...
Fermi, the top-ranked student in the graduating class.
He could either perfectly conceal his allies' skills or drastically enhance them.
Whatever method he used, it was clear he could do one of those two things.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Hmm, so you were ultimately overpowered. Then there's no room for excuses. No wonder Master Olivia didn't intervene.
Amy shook her head.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Of course, she had no intention of making excuses for her defeat. But it wasn't because she lacked skill.
In a fair fight, or at least if the neutral factions hadn't been swayed by Fermi, she would have made it to the final ten.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: If those are the rules, I don't want to argue. But compared to the other participants, my skills were never inferior. I'm not saying Samuel should have been eliminated instead of me. If Fermi can control the battlefield's flow, anyone targeted would inevitably be eliminated.
Dante blinked in surprise.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Of course, you're strong. It's undeniable that you rose to the 5th rank in the graduating class within a year.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: But strictly speaking, it's because your talent is exceptionally outstanding.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Talent...?

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Currently, Alpheas Magic School has students as talented as those at the Royal Magic School. There's Iruki of Savant, Nade of Alchemy, Arin of Superhardness, Kanis who handles magical creatures, Shirone the Unlocker, and me, who uses the Central Calculation Magic Circle. Of course, Sabina and Closer are also formidable. Boyle of Summoning Magic and Pandora of Scent Magic each have their specialized talents.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: But if I were to rank based on what we were born with...

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: It's you. Amy, you're the best at Alpheas Magic School.
Amy didn't feel happy.
She still couldn't grasp what Dante was trying to say.
